title: fix: hide nectar tier from user-facing displays
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: A simpler garden path
gist.blurb: We've streamlined our dashboard and docs to focus on the core community journey: Spore, Seed, and Flower. A cleaner layout means an easier path to growing your ideas!
gist.summary: Streamlined the user-facing tier displays across the dashboard, website, and documentation to focus exclusively on the core Spore, Seed, and Flower tiers.
gist.impact: Users will experience a cleaner, three-column layout on the balance page and simplified documentation that highlights the primary community progression path.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the monitor robot tending to a garden with exactly three distinct, beautiful flowers (representing Spore, Seed, and Flower) in lime green pots, symbolizing the streamlined three-tier system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot tending to a digital garden with exactly three distinct, beautiful pixel flowers in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel peach and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot tending to a digital garden with exactly three distinct, beautiful pixel flowers in lime green (#ecf874) pots.
